  children={"Set Os"}

  method={"post"}
  path={"/set_os"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Command issued to set new firmware & initiate firmware update 

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"set_os","description":"Specifies the operation being performed, in this case, setting the reader operating system."},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123","description":"A unique identifier for the request, allowing tracking and debugging of the operation."},"OSUpdateDetails":{"title":"OSUpdateDetails","x-stoplight":{"id":"f9b02122e80a4"},"type":"object","properties":{"url":{"type":"string","format":"uri","example":"https://192.168.29.39:8000/Build-3.10.27/Firmware","description":"The URL where the OS update can be downloaded. Must be a valid URI."},"authenticationType":{"type":"string","enum":["NONE","BASIC","TOKEN","CERTIFICATE"],"example":"BASIC","description":"Specifies the type of authentication required for accessing the URL. NONE - No authentication is needed. BASIC - Username and password are required. CERTIFICATE - A valid inline certificate or preinstalled certificate is required. TOKEN - Token-based authentication is required."},"authOptions":{"type":"object","properties":{"username":{"type":"string","example":"admin","description":"The username for BASIC authentication."},"password":{"type":"string","example":"password","description":"The password for BASIC authentication."}},"description":"Contains authentication options such as username and password for BASIC authentication."},"headerParam":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the HTTP header parameter."},"value":{"type":"string","description":"The value of the HTTP header parameter."}}},"description":"A list of custom header parameters to include in the HTTP request."},"queryParam":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the query parameter."},"value":{"type":"string","description":"The value of the query parameter."}}},"description":"A list of query parameters to include in the URL."},"verificationType":{"type":"string","enum":["NONE","VERIFY_PEER","VERIFY_HOST","VERIFY_HOST_PEER"],"example":"NONE","description":"Specifies the type of verification to perform during the connection. NONE - No verification. VERIFY_PEER - Verify the peer's certificate. VERIFY_HOST - Verify the host's certificate. VERIFY_HOST_PEER - Verify both the host and peer certificates."},"caCertificateFileContent":{"type":"string","example":"-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\\\\r\\\\nPUdg=\\\\r\\\\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----","description":"The content of the CA certificate in PEM format, required for certificate-based authentication."},"caCertificateFile":{"type":"string","example":"/apps/ca.crt","description":"The file path to the CA certificate, required for certificate-based authentication."}},"required":["url","authenticationType"]}},"required":["command","requestId"]},"examples":{"Firmware update 1":{"description":"Payload to initiate firmware update with CA certificate content","value":{"command":"set_os","requestId":"abc123","OSUpdateDetails":{"url":"https://192.168.29.39:8000/Build-3.10.27/Firmware","authenticationType":"CERTIFICATE","verificationType":"VERIFY_HOST","caCertificateFileContent":"-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\\\\r\\\\nPUdg=\\\\r\\\\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----"}}},"Firmware update 2":{"description":"Payload to initiate firmware update without CA certificate content","value":{"command":"set_os","requestId":"abc123","OSUpdateDetails":{"url":"https://192.168.29.39:8000/Build-3.10.27/Firmware","authenticationType":"CERTIFICATE","verificationType":"VERIFY_HOST"}}},"Firmware update 3":{"description":"Payload to initiate firmware update with no authentication","value":{"command":"set_os","requestId":"abc123","OSUpdateDetails":{"url":"https://192.168.29.39:8000/Build-3.10.27/Firmware","authenticationType":"NONE","verificationType":"NONE"}}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"set_os response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"set_os"},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123"},"apiVersion":{"type":"string","enum":["V1.0","V1.1"],"example":"V1.1"},"response":{"title":"response","x-stoplight":{"id":"1uzw0wye4si2y"},"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer","example":0,"description":"Response codes:\n\n| Code | Meaning |\n| --- | --- |\n| 0 | Success |\n| 1 | Command payload is accepted |\n| 2 | Invalid payload |\n| 3 | Not able to retrieve information |\n| 4 | Firmware update in progress |\n| 5 | Can't reboot device, inventory in progress |\n| 6 | Region is not configured |\n| 7 | Interface is not available |\n| 8 | Insufficient flash size |\n| 9 | File not found |\n| 10 | Configuration already exists |\n| 11 | Inventory in progress |\n| 12 | No Radio Operation in Progress |\n| 13 | Firmware update Failed |\n| 14 | Battery is low, Cannot update firmware |\n| 15 | WIFI Error - SSID not found |\n| 16 | WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID |\n| 17 | WIFI Error - SSID missed |\n| 18 | WIFI Error - SSID already exist |\n| 19 | WIFI Error - SSID count overflow |\n| 20 | Wifi is not supported |\n| 21 | Certificate not found |\n| 22 | Advanced configuration not set |\n| 23 | Invalid enum value |\n| 24 | Max 32 prefilters limit exceeded |\n| 25 | Max 3 publish topics exceeded |\n| 26 | Max 1 subscribe topic exceeded |\n| 27 | Invalid tenant ID length |\n| 28 | Tag match pattern length exceeded |\n| 29 | Url missing for HTTP source |\n| 30 | Certificate content missing for direct source |","minimum":0,"maximum":30},"description":{"type":"string","description":"response description in detail","example":"Success"}},"required":["code","description"]}},"required":["command","requestId","apiVersion"]},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"command":"set_os","requestId":"18996","apiVersion":"V1.1","response":{"code":1,"description":"Command payload is accepted"}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
